---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

One or two sentences describing what you want.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed design

If you have a specific design in mind (new flags, new module, API changes), describe it here. Where would this fit in the existing pipeline?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you discounted them.

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help review / test
- [ ] No, but I would find it useful
